def negative_python_perf_layer_collection_iteration_list_comprehension_only_for_side_effect():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_collection_iteration_list_comprehension_only_for_side_effect"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Collection iteration. Flag list comprehensions used only for side effects, forcing unnecessary list allocation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
